about.title: About The Ruby Train
about.lead: The Ruby Train is a platform to learn and build with Ruby on Rails. You’ll find guided content, assessments, and a community to support you.
about.who: People who want a hands-on Rails path: students, devs switching stacks, and professionals aiming to validate foundations.

features.cert_path: A path aligned with the Ruby Programmer Silver exam.

about.cta: Hop on the train: practice, validate, and ship.

intro.title: Welcome to The Ruby Train
intro.text: Learn Rails with a clear path and real projects.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: We help you ship production-grade Rails apps.

contact.title: Contact

validations.required: Please fill name, email and message.

contact.success: Message sent! We’ll get back to you soon.
